    populateContractDetails(Contract) - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Populates the input fields with the details of the selected contract.
    populateRoomDetails(Room) - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Populates the input fields with the details of the selected room.
    populateStudentDetails(Student) - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Populates the input fields with the details of the selected student.
    price - Variable in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
     
    primaryStage - Static variable in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloApplication
    The primary stage of the application, stored statically to allow access from other parts of the application.
    PropertiesBundleProvider - Class in org.example.oopjavagroupproject
    A custom ResourceBundleProvider to ensure that .properties files are loaded with UTF-8 encoding.
